text.message: once red get wheat port is over
i'm not being extorted by you

yes, and you have no potential either

No ore has rolled at all
What are you complaining about, black?
you guys know that blue has uncontested road
Ah, so blue is a threat?
Yeah, and many people are slow to take note of it
the play is double rob on blue
if you want to take road
Oj doesn't seem interested in road lol
so you need to extend blue
Black is highly likely at 9 here
With knights or monos or whatever
Glad I was robbed even in the end there
